# location LocationFixReader — on-device am instrument (emulator-5554, API 34)
# mapAccuracyToPriority: positive on-device assertion.
# awaitNextLocation: drives the real fused provider for the full window, then
#   Assume-skips because this headless emulator's GNSS HAL emits no location for
#   an injected 'geo fix' (dumpsys gps provider: locations=0) and the indoor Pixel
#   can't settle a fresh fix. Passes wherever a fix IS obtainable.
